title: SunsetCat's Create Modpack
description: A funky little modpack focused on Create and some other mods that improve and expand the Vanilla experience!
body:
# SunsetCat's Create Modpack
A funky little modpack focused on Create and some other mods that improve and expand the Vanilla experience!

## Content
This modpack is centered around the Create mod. Furthermore, this modpack includes mods that expand on the Vanilla experience - such as Wan's Ancient Beasts - or improve upon it - Trample Prevention.

This modpack comes with configuration files already set up for the desired experience.

### Existing File Overwrite Notice
Please note, the installation of this modpack into an existing Minecraft instance folder will result in some - if not all - congifuration and options files being overwritten! Please back up all configuration and options files if you do not want this to happen.

### Optional Mods
Although some mods are marked as "optional," their installation is nevertheless highly recommended. Regardless, any client and server that has this modpack installed will be compatible with each other regardless of if they have the optional mods installed.

## License
This modpack is licensed under the "GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1" ("LGPL-2.1"). Modrinth mods linked to by this modpack use their own licenses. The "Spice of Life: Carrot Edition" CurseForge mod included in this modpack is licensed under "LGPL-2.1."

## Disclaimer
NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
